creator: svvord@mail.ru
text:
The DoxyGenFilter project has been taken over by Bret Jordan and replaced to SourceForge with new name "Doxygen-Filter-Perl". [http://www.bigsister.ch/doxygenfilter/news.html]

So the port devel/p5-Doxygen-Filter-Perl should replace the port devel/p5-doxygenfilter.

And port devel/p5-doxygenfilter should be removed.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
